papers.title: Real-Time Whole-Body Teleoperation of a Humanoid Robot Using IMU-Based Motion Capture with Sim2Sim and Sim2Real Validation
papers.summary: 该论文提出了一种基于IMU动作捕捉的实时全身人形机器人遥操作系统，实现了从模拟验证到真实平台的无缝迁移。

papers.title: Cooperative Robotics Reinforced by Collective Perception for Traffic Moderation
papers.summary: 提出一种融合基础设施视觉与V2X通信的协作人形机器人，通过主动阻止车辆防止NLOS路口碰撞，突破传统V2X无法影响未联网车辆的局限。

papers.title: Mapping Embodied Affective Touch Strategies on a Humanoid Robot
Explicit Stair Geometry Conditioning for Robust Humanoid Locomotion
papers.summary: 论文提出将楼梯的可解释几何参数（步高、步深、偏航角）作为显式条件输入PPO策略，实现对人形机器人楼梯攀爬的主动控制和泛化能力的显著提升。

companyNews.title: Hyundai Motor aims to turn robot factory into data gold mine, with $2.7 bn annual profit potential - KED Global
companyNews.summary: 现代汽车计划将Boston Dynamics机器人工厂转化为数据服务平台，预计年利润潜力达27亿美元。这对人形机器人行业意义：标志着机器人厂商从硬件销售向数据服务商业化的重要转型，凸显工业数据资产的巨

companyNews.title: Hyundai Motor Tops 700,000 Won as Physical AI Stocks Surge - Seoul Economic Daily
companyNews.summary: 现代汽车股价突破70万韩元，受Physical AI概念推动上涨，反映资本市场对实体AI及机器人领域信心增强。

companyNews.title: A Chinese factory in Guangdong is assembling a humanoid robot every 30 minutes while Tesla, Figure, and Boston Dynamics still struggle to deliver 10 thousand per year. - CPG Click Petróleo e Gás
companyNews.summary: 广东工厂每30分钟组装一台人形机器人，生产效率远超Tesla等公司年产能，预示成本优势将重塑全球人形机器人竞争格局。

companyNews.title: Figure Founder: F.04 Robot Initiates Component Delivery Process - Gasgoo
companyNews.summary: Figure AI发布F.04机器人启动组件交付流程，标志其人形机器人技术在实际应用场景取得新进展，为商业化落地奠定基础。

companyNews.title: Two Figure F.03 Humanoid Robots Just Reset an Entire Bedroom in Under Two Minutes - TechEBlog -
companyNews.summary: Figure F.03双足机器人在2分钟内完成卧室整理，展示人形机器人家务应用的
